first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same in both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as an experienced software engineer who lacks the specific, critical hardware and AI accelerator expertise required for the Principal Performance Architect role. The minor differences in phrasing and the specific examples of missing skills cited (e.g., SIMD/MIMD) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate that the change in name influenced the assessment.
